title: Mango's Better Title Logo
description: A Simple Resource Pack That Changes The Minecraft Title Logo To Have Effects On Each Letter Like You See In Every Update Logo But Every Letter Is Unique !
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02ab29885bf589fcebe421bdfc519ea10376d6fe.png)
# **Mr Mango's Better Title Logo..**
This Packs Makes The Minecraft Title Logo Looks **Better** And Have This **Cool** Texture Down ↓

There ~~Is~~ Will Be A Version With The Java Edition Subtitle Too (Check Versions)
